name: Roguelike Dungeon Crawler Starter
description: Turn-based or real-time 2D roguelike with procedural dungeon generation using BSP algorithm. Player with stats (HP, ATK, DEF, SPD). Turn-based grid movement. Enemy AI with A* pathfinding. Fog of war visibility system. Randomized weapon/potion/scroll drops. Permadeath with run summary. Floor progression with stairs.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project config with AutoLoads: TurnManager (singleton for turn ordering)

scenes/.dungeon_level.tscn: Root Node2D with TileMap (base layer, walls layer, fog_of_war layer), Player, EnemySpawner, ItemSpawner, Stairs, MessageLog CanvasLayer, StatsPanel CanvasLayer
scenes/.player.tscn: CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D, CollisionShape2D, GridMovement script, InventoryNode, StatsNode (HP/ATK/DEF/SPD)
scenes/.enemy_skeleton.tscn: CharacterBody2D enemy with Sprite2D, CollisionShape2D, AIComponent (pathfinding), CombatComponent, LootTable
scenes/.enemy_slime.tscn: CharacterBody2D enemy with simpler AI (melee-only), lower stats than skeleton
scenes/.items/weapon.tscn: Area2D item with Sprite2D, random properties (atk_bonus: 0-5, crit_chance: 0-20%)
scenes/.items/potion.tscn: Area2D item (healing: 25-50 HP, mana: 0-30, stat boost: +5 STR for 3 turns)
scenes/.items/scroll.tscn: Area2D item with spell effects (fireball: 15 damage in radius, teleport, identify unknown items)
scenes/.stairs.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (stair icon), Area2D trigger for floor transition
scenes/.ui/stats_panel.tscn: CanvasLayer with VBoxContainer showing Player stats (HP/max_HP, ATK, DEF, SPD, Level, XP bar)
scenes/.ui/minimap.tscn: CanvasLayer TextureRect or custom minimap renderer showing visible dungeon + fog
scenes/.ui/inventory.tscn: CanvasLayer with GridContainer (3x4) showing equipped items + inventory slots
scenes/.ui/death_screen.tscn: PopupPanel with run summary: deepest_floor, enemies_killed, gold_collected, items_found, final_stats
scenes/.ui/message_log.tscn: CanvasLayer with RichTextLabel auto-scrolling message history (red for damage, green for heal, white for events)

scripts/.dungeon_generator.gd: Implements BSP dungeon generation. Methods: generate(width, height, max_room_size) → creates TileMap with walls/floors, rooms array, corridor connections. Uses Rect2 binary space partition to recursively divide space, carve rooms, and connect via corridors. Returns list of room centers for enemy spawning
scripts/.player.gd: Inherits CharacterBody2D. Properties: hp (int), atk (int), def (int), spd (int), level (int), xp (int). Methods: move_to(grid_pos) validates path via TileMap, enemies_in_the_way, updates visibility fog. take_damage(amount) applies DEF reduction. gain_xp(amount) triggers level_up on threshold. Signals: player_moved, player_died, level_increased
scripts/.enemy_ai.gd: Inherits CharacterBody2D. Attached to enemy scene. Properties: state (patrol/chase/attack), hp, atk, def. Methods: _physics_process() implements state machine. On player visibility (via fog_of_war), transitions to chase. Uses AStar2D pathfinding to move toward player each turn. On adjacent to player, attacks. On out-of-sight, returns to patrol. Signals: enemy_died(loot_table)
scripts/.turn_manager.gd: AutoLoad singleton. Manages turn order. Array of turn_actors (player, all enemies). Methods: next_turn() increments turn, calls _ready() on current actor. Tracks current_turn_actor. Signals: turn_changed, player_turn, enemy_turn
scripts/.fog_of_war.gd: Creates visibility TileMap layer (separate from main). On player_moved signal, clears visible_cells set. Uses RayCast2D circle cast from player in 8 directions to determine visible tiles. Updates fog layer: visible=transparent, invisible=dark overlay. Methods: update_visibility(player_pos)
scripts/.item_generator.gd: Static methods for random loot. Methods: generate_weapon() → Weapon.tscn with random atk_bonus (0-5) and crit_chance (0-20%). generate_potion() → Potion with random effect. generate_scroll() → Scroll with random spell. Uses weights dict for rarity: common (60%), uncommon (30%), rare (10%)
scripts/.combat_resolver.gd: Static combat system. Methods: calculate_hit(attacker_atk, defender_def, crit_chance) → bool. calculate_damage(base_atk, attacker_bonus, defender_def) → int (applies ATK + bonus, reduced by DEF). Called by player.gd and enemy_ai.gd on attack
scripts/.floor_manager.gd: Tracks current_floor (int), generates level on load via DungeonGenerator, spawns enemies via ItemGenerator, manages floor transitions. On stairs.area_entered(player), increments floor, clears scene, generates next floor. Scales enemy stats with floor number (hp+10%, atk+5% per floor)

assets/.tilesets/dungeon.tres: TileSet with: floor (walkable), wall (collision), door, stairs_up, stairs_down
assets/.sprites/player.png: 32x32 player character sprite with 4-direction idle/moving frames
assets/.sprites/ui/: Icons for stats, minimap, health bar
assets/.fonts/: Monospace font for message log, default font for UI

preBuiltMechanics: BSP procedural dungeon generation with room-and-corridor layout
Grid-based turn system alternating player and AI enemies
Player stats: HP, ATK, DEF, SPD with leveling/XP system
Enemy AI using A* pathfinding (AStar2D) with state machine (patrol/chase/attack)
Fog of war visibility layer updated per turn using RayCast2D circle cast
Combat system: hit chance based on ATK/DEF, critical strike chance, damage calculation
Item drops: weapons (ATK bonus), potions (healing/buff), scrolls (spells)
Permadeath with run summary (floor reached, kills, gold, items found)
Floor progression with difficulty scaling (enemy stats increase per floor)
Real-time minimap showing explored areas and current position
customizationPoints: Add player classes (warrior/rogue/mage) with unique starting stats and abilities
Implement spell/ability system with mana resource and cooldowns
Create boss encounters on specific floors with unique mechanics
Add status effects: poison, stun, bleed, burn (damage over time)
Implement equipment slots: head/body/hands/feet/rings with stat bonuses
Create trap system: pressure plates, dart shooters, bear traps with detection/disarm
Add merchant NPC rooms for mid-run item purchases
Implement multiplayer co-op with shared dungeon and PvP zones
Create artifact system with unique passive abilities and legendary items
Add hardcore/ironman mode with global leaderboards
examplePrompts: Add player classes (Warrior/Rogue/Mage) with different starting stats and unique abilities
Implement a mana system with spellcasting (fireball, freeze, teleport)
Create status effects (poison damage per turn, stun prevents movement, bleed stacks)
Add equipment system: head/body/legs/feet/2-rings with stat bonuses
Implement trap tiles: pressure plates trigger dart traps, floor spikes deal damage
Create an NPC merchant on every 5th floor offering item purchases
Add a boss enemy on floor 10 with 3 phases and special attacks
Implement a 'run history' that tracks best runs and leaderboard
Create cursed items that grant power but with downsides (cursed ring auto-equips, -5% accuracy)
Add food/hunger system where player must eat to avoid HP drain per turn
